files.content:
"use client"

import { RangeChart } from "@/components/ui/charts"

const teamAData = [
  { category: "Jan", low: 3000, high: 3500, mid: 3200 },
  { category: "Feb", low: 4500, high: 5200, mid: 4800 },
  { category: "Mar", low: 4000, high: 4800, mid: 4400 },
  { category: "Apr", low: 3300, high: 4000, mid: 3600 },
  { category: "May", low: 5000, high: 6200, mid: 5800 },
  { category: "Jun", low: 5500, high: 6500, mid: 5900 },
  { category: "Jul", low: 2000, high: 2800, mid: 2400 },
  { category: "Aug", low: 900, high: 1500, mid: 1200, forecast: true },
  { category: "Sep", low: 1800, high: 2600, mid: 2200, forecast: true },
  { category: "Oct", low: 1200, high: 2000, mid: 1600, forecast: true },
]

const teamBData = [
  { category: "Jan", low: 1000, high: 1800, mid: 1400 },
  { category: "Feb", low: 1200, high: 2000, mid: 1600 },
  { category: "Mar", low: 1800, high: 2600, mid: 2200 },
  { category: "Apr", low: 2000, high: 2600, mid: 2300 },
  { category: "May", low: 2200, high: 3200, mid: 2800 },
  { category: "Jun", low: 800, high: 1400, mid: 1000 },
  { category: "Jul", low: 1600, high: 2400, mid: 2000 },
  { category: "Aug", low: 900, high: 1300, mid: 1100, forecast: true },
  { category: "Sep", low: 1500, high: 2100, mid: 1800, forecast: true },
  { category: "Oct", low: 1600, high: 2200, mid: 1900, forecast: true },
]

export default function RangeChartErrorBars() {
  return (
    <RangeChart
      series={[
        { name: "Team A", data: teamAData, color: "#22d3ee" },
        { name: "Team B", data: teamBData, color: "#f87171" },
      ]}
      lowLabel="Min"
      highLabel="Max"
      midLabel="Value"
    />
  )
}
